honestBound: Live end-to-end validation of GoogleFactCheckBackend. Confirms the integration works on general/viral claims (ClaimReview's home turf) and QUANTIFIES that the API does not cover Sophia's literary-provenance domain — so this external oracle complements, but cannot replace, the Wikidata/Crossref provenance path. Corroborates the failure-ledger note with live data.
